LightningComponentBundle.description: CM demo activity scorecard with multilingual labels.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Account Id
property.description: Account Id to display metrics for when not placed on an Account record page.

property.name: headerLabel
property.label: Header Label
property.description: Text displayed in the component header.

property.name: lookbackDays
property.label: Lookback Window (Days)
property.description: Number of days to include when calculating metrics (1-365).

property.name: targetUserId
property.label: User Id
property.description: Override the user whose owned accounts are aggregated when the component is not bound to a specific Account.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Account Id
property.description: Account Id to display metrics for.

property.name: targetUserId
property.label: User Id
property.description: Override the user whose owned accounts are aggregated when record Id is not provided.
